title: AmountTypeValues
description: The status of the standing order

x-enumeration-literals.name: Principal
x-enumeration-literals.description: The principal/base amount is the original sum of money that is borrowed, invested, or deposited, excluding any interest, fees, or taxes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Actual
x-enumeration-literals.description: Actual amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Estimated
x-enumeration-literals.description: Estimated amount (the final amount could be above or below).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Maximum
x-enumeration-literals.description: Maximum amount (the final amount must be less or equal).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Default
x-enumeration-literals.description: Default amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Replacement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Replacement amount.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incremental
x-enumeration-literals.description: Incremental amount for reservation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Decremental
x-enumeration-literals.description: Decremental amount for reservation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reserved
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reserved or updated reserved amount for reservation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Available
x-enumeration-literals.description: The available amount is the portion of funds that a customer can immediately use or withdraw from an account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Used
x-enumeration-literals.description: The used amount is the portion of funds or credit that has already been consumed, drawn, or committed from a total available limit or facility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Due Payable
x-enumeration-literals.description: The due payable amount is the total amount that must be paid by a specified due date to meet a financial obligation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Minimum
x-enumeration-literals.description: The minimum amount is the smallest payment required by the due date to keep the account in good standing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Open
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount is open.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Unknown
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount is unkown.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed
x-enumeration-literals.description: The amount represents a fixed value.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Calculated
x-enumeration-literals.description: The calculated amount is the result of a computation based on a defined formula, rate, or rule before any posting or settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Applied
x-enumeration-literals.description: The applied amount is the amount that has been effectively posted, charged, or credited to an account or transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Requested
x-enumeration-literals.description: The requested amount is the amount instructed, claimed, or demanded by a party for payment or processing.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accrued
x-enumeration-literals.description: The accrued amount is the amount that has accumulated over time but is not yet applied, billed, or settled.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Outstanding
x-enumeration-literals.description: The outstanding amount is the total amount that remains unpaid or unsettled at a given point in time.
